100% Open Source · Zero License Fees

ERPNext: Built for Speed.
Designed for Scale.

ERPNext delivers enterprise-grade functionality without the enterprise price tag. Built on the modern Frappe framework, it is fast, mobile-friendly, and fully customisable — so you can run your entire business your way. Ecosoft clients consistently save 60–80% versus SAP and Oracle licensing costs.

Modules

Key Modules That Mean Business

💼

Sales

Automates the entire order-to-cash process while providing real-time insights to boost sales efficiency and growth.

🛒

Procurement / Buying

Streamlines purchasing by automating supplier management, purchase orders, and material requests for cost-effective procurement.

🤝

CRM

Handles lead management, opportunity tracking, and customer interactions, enhancing sales efficiency and fostering stronger client relationships.

📒

Accounting

Streamlines financial management by integrating transactions across sales, purchases, and inventory with real-time financial insights.

📦

Inventory Management

Stock control with real-time tracking, automated replenishment, and comprehensive reporting for optimal inventory levels.

🏭

Manufacturing

Integrates material planning, work orders, and quality control—enhancing efficiency and reducing costs.

👥

HR Management (HRMS)

Simplifies recruitment, payroll, attendance, and appraisals—bringing all workforce management into one seamless system.

🏗️

Asset Management

Handles the entire asset lifecycle — from acquisition to disposal — enhancing tracking, maintenance, and financial oversight.

📋

Project Management

Integrates tasks, timelines, resources, and budgets into a unified system for end-to-end project planning and execution.

E-Commerce

Website & E-Commerce Integration

Sell online without the integration headache. ERPNext connects your website and online store directly to inventory, accounting, and fulfilment — so every order updates stock, triggers invoicing, and reaches your warehouse automatically.

Get started
🛍️ Online Store 🔄 Real-time Sync 💳 Payment Gateways 📦 Auto Inventory Update

Why ERPNext

8 Reasons Leading Organisations Choose ERPNext

01

Open Source & Cost-Effective

No license fees. No vendor lock-in. ERPNext is fully open source, giving you total freedom and full control over your ERP investment.

02

Built on Frappe Framework

Powered by the robust Frappe Framework — a modern, low-code web framework in Python and JavaScript. Industry-rich, API-first, with 130+ integrations.

03

Highly Customisable & Scalable

Every business is unique. From custom workflows to handling large data volumes, ERPNext is flexible enough to serve growing organisations of any size.

04

User-Friendly Interface

ERPNext offers a clean, role-based interface your team can learn in days — not months. Fast adoption means faster ROI and lower training costs.

05

Integrated CRM & Business Functions

Manage sales, leads, support, accounting, inventory, HR, and payroll — all in one platform. No more juggling multiple tools.

06

Integration Capabilities

Connect ERPNext to e-commerce platforms, payment gateways, and third-party tools with a robust API-first integration layer.

07

Cloud Hosting & Enterprise Scaling

From growing businesses to large enterprises, ERPNext scales with your needs. Cloud hosting is available via Frappe Cloud for maximum reliability.

08

Active Community & Local Support

The global ERPNext community releases updates every 6–8 weeks — security patches, new features, and bug fixes included. Ecosoft's local team ensures those updates work for Thai compliance.

Pricing

ERPNext Implementation Packages

Fixed-scope packages for straightforward implementations. Complex organisations are covered by our Enterprise tier.

Pricing ranges from ฿1,500,000 to ฿3,000,000+ depending on scope. Contact us for a tailored quote.

Integrations

Connect Anything. Sync Everything.

From e-commerce platforms to payment gateways, ERPNext integrates effortlessly with 130+ tools — so your entire tech stack works in perfect harmony.

Ready to See ERPNext in Action?

Zero license fees. Full source code ownership. Thai compliance built in. Our team has delivered 40+ ERPNext implementations across manufacturing, logistics, government, and more. Let's build yours.
